home.guestExperienceTitle: A smoother stay from arrival to checkout.
home.guestExperienceBody: Need fresh towels, a late checkout, or a restaurant recommendation? At {{name}}, guests can reach reception and request services digitally — quietly, without waiting on hold.
home.guestExperienceFootnote: Modern service, without the friction. Built in.

features.scanText: A quick QR in your room connects you to reception.
features.messageText: Chat, call, or WhatsApp — whatever works for you.
features.towelsText: Send a request and we'll handle it silently.
features.lateText: Ask for extra time. We'll do our best to say yes.

home.ctaTitle: Book direct and get the best rate.
home.ctaDescription: No booking fees, no commission markup — just the real price and a direct line to our reception.

rooms.metaDesc: Browse our rooms, from cozy doubles to mountain-view deluxes.
rooms.title: Find the room that fits your stay.
rooms.subtitle: Four room types, designed for rest, with the details we'd want ourselves.
rooms.ctaTitle: Not sure which room suits you?
rooms.ctaDesc: We're happy to help you pick the right fit — just send us a quick message.

gallery.metaDesc: A visual tour of our rooms, lobby, breakfast, and the surroundings.
gallery.title: A look around {{name}}.

offers.metaDesc: Seasonal packages and special rates when you book direct.
offers.title: Stay a little longer, a little better.
offers.subtitle: A few simple packages, available only when you book direct with us.
offers.disabledBody: Please get in touch — we'd love to help with your stay.

location.title: In the heart of {{city}}.
location.subtitle: Moments from the old town, minutes from the mountains, and a short drive from everything worth seeing in the Carpathians.
location.parkingBody: Free on-site parking is available for all guests on a first-come basis. We recommend arriving before 20:00 to secure a spot during busier weekends.
location.gettingAroundBody: Most of the old town is easily walkable. Taxis are inexpensive, and Uber/Bolt work well. For the mountains, we can help arrange a rental car or a private driver.

contact.metaDesc: Reach our reception by phone, email, or WhatsApp.
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.validation: Please fill in name, email and message.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page.
notFound.body: The link might be old, or the page may have moved. Let's head back.

guest.metaDesc: Request services and help during your stay.
guest.hubTitle: How can we help with your stay?
guest.hubSubtitle: Tap a category, send a quick request — we'll take care of it.
guest.whichRoomHint: Tap your room or enter the number below.
guest.selectFirst: Select your room above to send a request.
guest.qrInactive: This QR code isn't active. Please contact reception.

request.willReview: Our team will review it shortly.
request.subjectAvailability: Subject to availability. Reception will confirm.

feedback.title: Private feedback
feedback.desc: Only the hotel team will see this. Room {{label}}.
feedback.commentPlaceholder: Tell us how your stay is going…
feedback.thankYouBody: Your feedback was sent privately to the hotel team.

wifi.label: Fast Wi-Fi
wifi.desc: Free high-speed internet in every room.

parking.label: Free Parking
parking.desc: Secure on-site parking for all guests.

reception.label: 24/7 Reception
reception.desc: A real person, day or night.

garden.label: Quiet Garden
garden.desc: A small courtyard to slow down in.

admin.bilingualHint: Content is not translated automatically. Add Romanian and English copy manually.

testimonialsPage.title: Testimonials
testimonialsPage.subtitle: Manage guest reviews shown on the homepage.
testimonialsPage.empty: No testimonials yet. Add the first one.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.subtitle: Snapshot of activity at {{name}}.
dashboardPage.readyToValidate: Ready to validate with hotel owners?
dashboardPage.runChecklist: Run through the MVP checklist before your first demo.

requestsPage.title: Guest requests
requestsPage.subtitle: Live feed from in-room QR codes.
requestsPage.noRequestsHint: Requests submitted through the QR GuestHub will appear here.

messagesPage.title: Guest inbox
messagesPage.subtitle: Messages submitted from the public contact page. Reply by email directly from here.
messagesPage.selectMessage: Select a message to read and reply.

servicesPage.title: Service items
servicesPage.subtitle: Items guests can request via the QR GuestHub.
servicesPage.deleteDesc: This will remove the item permanently. Past requests are kept.

serviceDialog.desc: Active items appear in the GuestHub for guests.
serviceDialog.title: Title

roomsPage.title: Rooms
roomsPage.subtitle: Active rooms appear on the public website.

roomDialog.desc: Active rooms appear on the public site.
roomDialog.name: Name
roomDialog.pastePlaceholder: Paste an image URL or upload
roomDialog.qrCreated: A QR code was generated automatically.

offersPage.title: Offers & packages
offersPage.subtitle: Direct-booking offers shown on the public Offers page.
offersPage.offersPageHint: When off, the “Offers” link is hidden and visiting /offers shows nothing.

qrPage.title: Room QR codes
qrPage.subtitle: Each room has a unique QR. Print it and place it in the room.

contentPage.title: Website content
contentPage.subtitle: Edit the copy, hero image, and gallery shown on the public website.
contentPage.heroDesc: The main background image at the top of the homepage.
contentPage.galleryDesc: Upload images shown on the public Gallery page.

sections.heroDesc: Headline and CTAs on the homepage.
sections.contactDesc: Heading and intro on the contact section.
sections.trust_stripDesc: Quick reassurances shown just below the hero.
sections.why_usDesc: Reasons guests choose and recommend the property.
sections.guest_convenienceDesc: Subtle section showing how guests can request anything without going to the front desk.
sections.home_cta_Desc: Closing booking call-to-action on the homepage.
sections.home_ctaDesc: Closing booking call-to-action on the homepage.

reportsPage.title: Monthly value
reportsPage.estimateDisclaimer: Financial figures are estimates for management insight, not accounting data.
reportsPage.paysForItself: GuestHub has likely covered its monthly cost this month.
reportsPage.moreActivity: More guest activity will make this report more meaningful over time.
reportsPage.assumptionsHint: Adjust these to match your hotel. Saved locally in your browser.

mvpPage.title: Validation checklist
mvpPage.subtitle: Walk through these items before showing the product to a hotel owner.
mvpPage.savedLocally: Progress is saved locally in your browser. Reset by clearing site data.

usersPage.title: Users
usersPage.subtitle: Manage which staff accounts have admin access.
usersPage.step1: Ask the new staff member to sign up at
usersPage.step2: Copy their user ID (visible to them after first login in their browser, or you can find it in the auth records).
usersPage.step3: Paste it below and click Grant admin.
usersPage.firstNote: Note: the very first account to sign up becomes admin automatically.
usersPage.cannotRevokeSelf: You cannot revoke your own admin
usersPage.mustRemain: At least one admin must remain

settingsPage.title: Property settings
settingsPage.subtitle: These values power the public website and guest experience.
settingsPage.notificationsHint: Configure how staff is alerted when a new guest request arrives.
settingsPage.soundAlertsHint: Plays a short tone in this browser when a new request comes in.

realtime.newRequestDescription: Tap to open the requests list

auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.firstAdminNote: The first account to sign up is automatically made admin. Subsequent signups need approval from an existing admin.
auth.useCredentials: Use your admin email and password.
auth.afterSignup: After signup, an existing admin must grant you the admin role.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: If you are the first signup, you have been granted admin automatically. Otherwise, ask an existing admin to grant you the admin role from the Users page.
auth.manageStay: Manage your stay experience, from one place.
auth.manageDesc: Requests, services, rooms, and content — all editable, all yours.
